groups.hint2: To do something without being seen or heard.
groups.hint3: These actions are often completed with the preposition "in".

groups.hint2: Elaborate plans, sometimes for ill gain or artistic effect.
groups.hint3: Financial traps or a sequence of similar sounds in poetry.

groups.category: BODY PARTS SURROUNDED BY TWO LETTERS
groups.hint1: Think about words that contain smaller, meaningful units.
groups.hint2: Each word conceals a common three-letter human feature.
groups.hint3: Every word here spells out a body part between its first and last letter.
